name: cvd-record appends each disclosure record to the C-4 audit log when one is given
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","advisory_id":"GHSA-x","source":"cisa-kev"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","advisory_id":"GHSA-y","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings f.json --audit-log a.jsonl 2>e.txt; grep -q 'audit_logged=1' e.txt && [ "$(wc -l < a.jsonl)" -eq 2 ] && echo c23-audit-log 1>&2
